data.title: PEPE Climbs 10% as Golden Cross Signals Possible Further Gains in Hot Memecoin Market
data.description:
• PEPE surged 10% in 24 hours to as high as $0.00001049, driven by a golden cross technical pattern that suggests sustained bullish momentum.
  • The rally was accompanied by a significant spike in trading volume, with 13.7 trillion tokens traded in a single hour, and has established a strong support level near $0.0000101.
  • The token has outperformed the wider cryptocurrency market, with the CoinDesk 20 index rising 5.92% in the same period.

data.title: Filecoin Gains as Much as 9% Amid Wider Crypto Market Rally
data.description:
• FIL gained as much as 9% as crypto markets rallied.
  • The token has now formed strong support at the $2.40 level.
  • Filecoin is holding an informal networking evening on July 3 in Cannes.

data.title: Abu Dhabi Ventures Into Bond Tokenization with HSBC and FAB as RWA Momentum Accelerates
data.description:
• The Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange is set to list the first blockchain-based bond in the region, issued by First Abu Dhabi Bank using HSBC's digital asset platform Orion.
  • The initiative is part of Abu Dhabi's strategy to lead in the tokenization of real-world assets, a market projected to grow significantly in the coming years.

data.title: U.S. Added 147K Jobs in June, Topping 110K Forecast; Unemployment Rate Unexpectedly Falls to 4.1%
data.description:
• U.S. nonfarm payrolls increase by 147,000 in June, easily topping forecasts for 110,000.
  • The unemployment rate fell to 4.1% against expectations for an increase to 4.3%.
  • Bitcoin dipped a bit to $109,500 immediately following the data.

data.title: Shiba Inu Chalks Out Bullish Inverse H&S as BONK Cheers ETF Speculation, 1M Holder Milestone
data.description:
• Shiba Inu (SHIB) completed a bullish reversal pattern, surging 5.2% amid significant volume spikes.
  • BONK, a memecoin on the Solana blockchain, rose 23%, driven by ETF speculation and strong buying interest.
  • Both SHIB and BONK displayed inverse head-and-shoulders patterns, indicating continued bullish momentum.

data.title: JPMorgan Sees Stablecoin Market Hitting $500B by 2028, Far Below Bullish Forecasts
data.description:
• The stablecoin market is expected to grow to $500 billion by 2028, JPMorgan said.
  • The bank's analysts said that forecasts calling for a $1 trillion to $2 trillion market cap within the same timeframe are far too optimistic.
  • The report noted that payments currently account for only 6% of stablecoin demand.

data.title: Bitcoin Tops $110K With BONK and FARTCOIN Gaining Over 20%
data.description:
• Bitcoin surpassed $110,000, reaching its highest level since June 11, driven by significant inflows into U.S.-listed spot ETFs.
  • The upswing in Bitcoin's price positively affected major cryptocurrencies like XRP, ETH, SOL, and ADA, with memecoins BONK and FARTCOIN showing over 20% gains.
  • Traders are anticipating the U.S. nonfarm payrolls data, which could influence Bitcoin's trajectory and test its historical high of $112,000.

data.title: XRP $3 Bets Dominate Trading Volumes as XRP/BTC's 'Wedge' Suggests Further Rally
data.description:
• XRP has risen by over 3.5% in the past 24 hours, alongside bullish expectations in the options market.
  • The $3 strike call option for XRP is the most traded, with significant buy trades indicating investor optimism.
  • XRP/BTC's daily chart shows a bullish breakout, contradicting bearish signals from moving averages.

data.title: Swiss Bank AMINA Introduces Custody, Trading With Ripple’s RLUSD Stablecoin
data.description:
• AMINA Bank has become the first globally operating bank to offer services with Ripple's stablecoin, RLUSD.
  • The bank said it would start with providing custody and trading for RLUSD for institutional clients and professional investors, with plans to expand services in the coming months.
  • Stablecoins are growing rapidly as efforts advance to regulate the asset class.

data.title: A Major Currency Outpaces Bitcoin With More Possible Momentum Ahead: Macro Markets
data.description:
• The euro-U.S. dollar pair has outperformed bitcoin in recent months, with both assets showing over 13% gains year-to-date.
  • Germany's new fiscal plan, including significant infrastructure spending, is shifting investor focus from U.S. to European assets.
  • Increased FX hedging by European investors is expected to continue supporting the euro against the dollar.
